mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, sort_no FROM category WHERE region = #{region} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, code, name, sort_no FROM city WHERE region = #{region} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT a.id, a.city_id, a.name, a.sort_no FROM area a JOIN city c ON c.id = a.city_id AND c.region = a.region AND c.status = 1 WHERE a.region = #{region} AND a.city_id = #{cityId} AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.sort_no ASC, a.id ASC

SELECT id, title, subtitle, image_url, link_url, sort_no FROM home_banner WHERE region = #{region} AND enabled = TRUE
AND (city_id IS NULL OR city_id = #{cityId})
AND city_id IS NULL
ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, feed_type AS type, title, subtitle, cover_url, shop_id, sort_no FROM home_feed WHERE region = #{region} AND enabled = TRUE
AND (city_id IS NULL OR city_id = #{cityId})
AND city_id IS NULL
ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.sql: JOIN area a ON a.id = s.area_id AND a.region = s.region AND a.status = 1 JOIN city c ON c.id = s.city_id AND c.region = s.region AND c.status = 1 JOIN category cat ON cat.id = s.category_id AND cat.region = s.region AND cat.status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop s

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.cover_url, s.score, s.price_per_capita, s.currency, s.address, a.name AS area_name, c.name AS city_name, cat.name AS category_name, s.has_deal, s.open_now, s.tags FROM shop s
ORDER BY s.score DESC, s.id DESC
ORDER BY s.has_deal DESC, s.score DESC, s.id DESC
ORDER BY a.sort_no ASC, s.id ASC
ORDER BY s.has_deal DESC, s.score DESC, s.id DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT s.id, s.category_id, s.city_id, s.area_id, s.latitude, s.longitude, s.name, s.cover_url, s.score, s.taste_score, s.env_score, s.service_score, s.price_per_capita, s.currency, s.address, s.phone, s.business_hours, s.summary, cat.name AS category_name, c.name AS city_name, a.name AS area_name, s.has_deal, s.open_now, s.tags FROM shop s LEFT JOIN category cat ON cat.id = s.category_id LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = s.area_id WHERE s.region = #{region} AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = FALSE AND s.id = #{shopId}

SELECT s.id, s.category_id, s.city_id, s.area_id, s.latitude, s.longitude, s.name, s.cover_url, s.score, s.price_per_capita, s.currency, s.address, a.name AS area_name, c.name AS city_name, cat.name AS category_name, s.has_deal, s.open_now, s.tags FROM shop s
WHERE s.region = #{region} AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = FALSE AND s.id != #{shopId} AND (s.category_id = #{categoryId} OR s.city_id = #{cityId}) ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.category_id = #{categoryId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN s.area_id = #{areaId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, s.score DESC, s.id ASC
SELECT id, shop_id, image_url, sort_no FROM shop_photo WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, shop_id, name, price, recommend_reason, sort_no FROM dish WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM review r

SELECT r.id, r.shop_id, r.user_id, r.user_name, r.score_overall AS score, r.content, r.like_count AS liked_count, r.comment_count, m.company_name AS merchant_reply_merchant_name, rr.content AS merchant_reply_content, rr.created_at AS merchant_reply_created_at, rr.updated_at AS merchant_reply_updated_at, r.created_at FROM review r LEFT JOIN review_merchant_reply rr ON rr.review_id = r.id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON m.id = rr.merchant_id
ORDER BY r.like_count DESC, r.comment_count DESC, r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
ORDER BY r.score_overall DESC, r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT s.name AS term, 'shop' AS type, s.id AS ref_id FROM shop s
WHERE s.region = #{region} AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = FALSE AND ( LOWER(s.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(s.tags) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(s.address) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') ) ORDER BY s.score DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.name AS term, 'category' AS type, c.id AS ref_id FROM category c WHERE c.region = #{region} AND c.status = 1 AND LOWER(c.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') ORDER BY c.sort_no ASC, c.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT name FROM category WHERE region = #{region} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT s.tags FROM shop s
WHERE s.region = #{region} AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = FALSE AND s.tags IS NOT NULL AND s.tags != ''

SELECT r.tags FROM review r JOIN shop s ON s.id = r.shop_id AND s.region = r.region AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = FALSE
WHERE r.region = #{region} AND r.audit_status = 1 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = FALSE AND r.tags IS NOT NULL AND r.tags != ''
SELECT id, user_id, region, keyword, search_type, created_at, updated_at FROM search_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND region = #{region} AND keyword = #{keyword} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO search_history( user_id, region, keyword, search_type ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{region}, #{keyword}, #{searchType} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, region, keyword, search_type, created_at, updated_at FROM search_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND region = #{region} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_view_daily(shop_id, biz_date, view_count) VALUES(#{shopId}, #{bizDate}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
